info.title: REST API for Common Features in Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications - Audit Report
info.description:
Last Updated January 2026

You can use Oracle REST APIs to view and manage data stored in Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications.

Whether you're experienced with or new to REST, use this guide to find what you need, including:

  • A quick start how-to that walks you through a simple request example.
  • Use cases that provide real-world solutions with code examples.
  • Detailed descriptions for each REST resource.

Some REST resources have more than one version. In the Tasks section, when you expand a resource that has more than one version, you'll notice that the main folder contains subfolders, such as 11.13.18.05 and v1 (latest), corresponding to the available resource versions. Resources that don't have a newer version continue to appear without any change in their folder structure. You can find additional details on how to work with the different resource versions in the Quick Start and other topics in the Get Started section.
info.x-summary: Last Updated January 2026 You can use Oracle REST APIs to view and manage data stored in Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: The date from which the audit history is to be retrieved. The format of the date can be yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss. You can retrieve audit history for up to one month.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: The date up to which the audit report data is to be retrieved. The format of the date can be yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The display name of the user.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: A predefined product value provided in the request. The valid values are available in the FND_AUDIT_WEBAPP_AM table.

parameters.name: eventType
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of events you want to include in the audit report such as insert, delete, update, or all events.

parameters.name: businessObjectType
parameters.description: The fully qualified view object name of the product to be included in the audit report.

parameters.name: includeChildObjects
parameters.description: Indicates whether to include the child objects of the business object in the audit report. The default value is false.

parameters.name: includeImpersonator
parameters.description: Indicates whether to include the impersonator name in the audit report. The default value is false. Note: The impersonation functionality is no longer available. However, if impersonation was used earlier, and if you set this parameter to true, the response displays the name of the impersonator as stored in audit report.

parameters.name: includeExtendedObjectIdentiferColumns
parameters.description: Indicates whether to include the context information for the business objects. The default value is false.

parameters.name: includeAttributes
parameters.description: Indicates whether the audit report includes business object attributes that were changed in the specified time period. The default value is true.

parameters.name: timeZone
parameters.description: The timezone to be used for the specified period of the audit report. The valid values are availbale in the FND_TIMEZONES_VL view.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: The page number in the audit report you want to view.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of records displayed in a page, in the audit report.

parameters.name: attributeDetailMode
parameters.description: Indicates whether the old and new attribute values are returned. If true, the old and new values are retrieved. If false, the response contains only attribute names, and not old and new values. The default value is false.

200.description: The following table describes the response for this task.

pageNumber.title: Page Number
pageNumber.description: The current page number in the audit report.

pageSize.title: Page Size
pageSize.description: The number of records displayed per page in the audit report.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the audit report request. The valid values are SUCCESS and FAIL.

actionName.title: Action Name
actionName.description: The request method name for which the response is retrieved such as getAuditHistory.

auditData.title: Audit data
auditData.description: The audit data retrieved for the specified criteria.

date.title: Date
date.description: The date when the audit record was inserted, updated, or deleted.

userName.title: User display name
userName.description: The display name of the user retrieving the audit report.

userInternalName.title: User internal name
userInternalName.description: The internal name of the user.

eventType.title: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of event such as insert, delete, update, or all events.

businessObject.title: Business Object(display name)
businessObject.description: The display name of the business object.

qualifiedBusinessObject.title: Business Object(internal name)
qualifiedBusinessObject.description: The fully qualified view object name.

descriptionInternal.title: Event description(internal name)
descriptionInternal.description: The internal description of the event.

attributeDetails.title: Attribute Details
attributeDetails.description: The attribute details displayed in the audit report. To inlcude these details, set includeAttributes attribute to true.

contextName1.title: Context Name1
contextName1.description: The display name of the first context attribute that defines the context of the change in the view object. The context name/value pairs are included in the audit report only when includeExtendedObjectIdentiferColumns attribute is set to true.

contextValue1.title: Context Value1
contextValue1.description: The value of the first context attribute defined in the view object.

contextName2.title: Context Name2
contextName2.description: The display name of the second context attribute that defines the context of the change in the view object.

contextValue2.title: Context Value2
contextValue2.description: The value of the second context attribute defined in the view object.

contextName3.title: Context Name3
contextName3.description: The display name of the third context attribute that defines the context of the change in the view object.

contextValue3.title: Context Value3
contextValue3.description: The value of the third context attribute defined in the view object.

attribute.title: Attribute Name
attribute.description: The display name of the attribute.

attributeInternalName.title: Attribute internal name
attributeInternalName.description: The internal name of the attribute.

newValue.title: Attribute new value
newValue.description: The new value of the attribute retrieved in the audit report.

newValueId.title: Attribute new value Id
newValueId.description: The attribute Id for the new value.

oldValue.title: Attribute old value
oldValue.description: The old value of the attribute retrieved in the audit report.

oldValueId.title: Attribute old value Id
oldValueId.description: The attribute Id of the old value.
